The mark consists of The "b" has an incomplete "e" inside it. Looks like an infinity symbol. Followed by a narrow vertical line. Then the letter "e", "a", "s", & "y", spelling out the word "easy".

Educational services, namely, conducting courses and seminars in the field of information on hair extensions, hair care, wig installation; wig creation; wig maintenance; and wig styling and distribution of course material in connection therewith; Educational services, namely, conducting webinars, in person seminars, and courses in the field of information on hair extensions, hair care, wig installation; wig creation; wig maintenance; and wig styling; Entertainment services, namely, providing podcasts in the field of information on hair extensions, hair care, wig installation; wig creation; wig maintenance; and wig styling; On-line journals, namely, blogs featuring information on hair extensions, hair care, wig installation; wig creation; wig maintenance; and wig styling; On-line video journals, namely, vlogs featuring nondownloadable videos in the field of information on hair extensions, hair care, wig installation; wig creation; wig maintenance; and wig styling; Production of podcasts; Providing a website featuring blogs and non-downloadable publications in the nature of articles in the field(s) of information on hair extensions, hair care, wig installation; wig creation; wig maintenance; and wig styling
The mark consists of a keyhole design to the left of the word "STORYTIME".
The mark consists of the shape of a woman with her right arm in her hair; to the left in a stacked stylized font reads Attractive essence.

The mark consists of An upper case "E" stylized to appear as a person in a running position. The base of the image represents the ground which is making contact with one of the runner's legs. The other leg is in a raised position with a bent knee. The arms are in a bent position which represents the runner using their arms for running momentum. The circle above the "E" represents the head of the runner.

The mark consists of a stylized font are the letters "B" with two abstract figures with a set of eyes to the right of it. Those are followed by another letter "B" and to the right of it is another abstract figure with eyes with a letter "Z" to the right of the abstract figure. Surrounding each letter and abstract figure is white leopard print.
